mapper.select: SELECT * FROM training_task WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT * FROM training_task
deleted = 0
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR subject LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND deadline < NOW()
AND status = #{status}
AND status IN (1, 2)
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM training_task WHERE deleted = 0 AND teacher_id = #{teacherId}
SELECT * FROM training_task WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status} AND deadline IS NOT NULL AND deadline < NOW()
